utterance: How many shots did Jayson Tatum take from the left corner?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND x <= -220 AND y <= 90
notes: Turn 1 anchor: establishes player=Tatum + zone=left_corner. Context carried to Turn 2.

prior_utterance: How many shots did Jayson Tatum take from the left corner?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND x <= -220 AND y <= 90 AND made_flag = 1
notes: 'he' → Tatum (Turn 1). Left corner zone carried forward. Adds made_flag = 1. Minimal delta — pronoun only.

utterance: What about from the right corner?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND x >= 220 AND y <= 90 AND made_flag = 1
notes: 'What about' = same player + same made_flag filter from Turn 2; only zone changes. Tests implicit carryover of player AND made constraint across two prior turns.

utterance: How many 3-pointers did Jaylen Brown attempt above the break?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%') AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' AND y > 90 AND distance > 22

prior_utterance: How many 3-pointers did Jaylen Brown attempt above the break?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jaylen Brown%') AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' AND y > 90 AND distance > 22
notes: 'his' → J.Brown. 'those' → above-break 3PT filter from Turn 1 fully carried. Metric changes to FG%.

utterance: Show me Derrick White's shots in Q4.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Derrick White%') AND period = 4

prior_utterance: Show me Derrick White's shots in Q4.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Derrick White%') AND period = 4 AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: 'were' carries player=White + period=4 from Turn 1. '3' resolves to shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'. Tests zone vs shot_type disambiguation.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Derrick White%') AND period = 3 AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: 'What about' = same player + same shot_type from Turn 2; only period changes. Tests 3-turn chain: White → Q4 → 3PT → Q3.

utterance: How many paint shots did Jrue Holiday take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jrue Holiday%') AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190

utterance: Did he make more than half of them?
prior_utterance: How many paint shots did Jrue Holiday take?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) > 0.5 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END as made_majority FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jrue Holiday%') AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: 'he' → Holiday. 'them' → paint shots from Turn 1. 'more than half' → FG% > 0.5 returned as yes/no boolean via CASE WHEN.

utterance: How many mid-range attempts did Payton Pritchard take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Payton Pritchard%') AND distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22

prior_utterance: How many mid-range attempts did Payton Pritchard take?
gold_sql: SELECT shot_type, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Payton Pritchard%') AND (distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 OR shot_type = '3PT Field Goal') GROUP BY shot_type
notes: 'that' → mid-range count from Turn 1. 'his 3-point attempts' adds 3PT. Uses OR to include both zones for side-by-side GROUP BY comparison.

utterance: What was Kristaps Porzingis shooting percentage from the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Porzi%') AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: Turn 1 anchor: player=Porzingis (ILIKE '%Porzi%' handles ģ) + zone=paint + metric=FG%.

utterance: How does that compare to his 3-point percentage?
prior_utterance: What was Kristaps Porzingis shooting percentage from the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 'paint' WHEN shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' THEN '3pt' END as zone, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Porzi%') AND (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 OR shot_type = '3PT Field Goal') GROUP BY zone
notes: 'that' → paint FG% from Turn 1. 'his' → Porzingis. CASE WHEN combines both zones for direct comparison. Tests implicit metric carryover (FG%) plus zone swap.

utterance: How many total shots did Sam Hauser take?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Sam Hauser%')

prior_utterance: How many total shots did Sam Hauser take?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN shot_type = '3PT Field Goal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as three_pt_share FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Sam Hauser%')
notes: 'were' carries player=Hauser from Turn 1. 'percentage were 3-pointers' → 3PT share = 3PT count / total. Tests metric derivation (share not FG%) from coreferred entity.
